title: PMEF Typed Relationships
description: Explicit, typed relationship objects between PMEF entities. Relationships are first-class objects stored in the NDJSON stream, enabling graph traversal, provenance tracking and cross-discipline linking without modifying the related objects themselves.

BaseRelationship.title: Relationship Base
BaseRelationship.description: Abstract base for all PMEF typed relationships. Never instantiated directly.

derivedBy.description: How this relationship was established: MANUAL, ADAPTER_IMPORT, AI_INFERRED, RULE_BASED

IsPartOf.title: Is Part Of
IsPartOf.description: Compositional containment. sourceId is a part of targetId. Directed: child → parent. Used for explicit cross-file references when isPartOf inline field is insufficient.

IsConnectedTo.title: Is Connected To
IsConnectedTo.description: Physical topological connection between two PMEF objects (piping, nozzle, cable). Complements Port.connectedTo for cross-type connections.

connectionPointSource.description: Port or nozzle ID on source object

connectionPointTarget.description: Port or nozzle ID on target object

IsDerivedFrom.title: Is Derived From
IsDerivedFrom.description: Derivation from a functional/logical object. The source physical object is derived from the target functional object (P&ID tag, DEXPI entity). Core mechanism for P&ID→3D linking.

sourceStandard.description: Standard of the target functional object, e.g. 'DEXPI_2.0', 'ISO_15926', 'PCA_RDL'

mappingVersion.description: Version of the mapping rule that created this derivation

Supports.title: Supports
Supports.description: Physical support relationship. sourceId physically supports or carries targetId. E.g. SteelMember supports PipeSupport; PipeSupport supports PipingSegment.

loadTransferred.description: Load transferred at this support point

ControlledBy.title: Controlled By
ControlledBy.description: Control relationship. sourceId (equipment, valve) is controlled by targetId (instrument, PLC, loop). Bridges physical and E&I domains.

IsDocumentedBy.title: Is Documented By
IsDocumentedBy.description: Links a PMEF object to a document. Complements the inline documents[] array for cross-file document management.

IsRevisionOf.title: Is Revision Of
IsRevisionOf.description: Version history link. sourceId is a newer revision of targetId. Enables full provenance chains across revisions.

HasEquivalentIn.title: Has Equivalent In
HasEquivalentIn.description: Cross-format equivalence. sourceId in PMEF is equivalent to targetId in another system or standard. Used by adapters to record native tool IDs.

targetSystemId.description: Native ID in the target system

IsCollocatedWith.title: Is Collocated With
IsCollocatedWith.description: Spatial co-location. Both objects share the same physical location or mounting point. Useful for grouped instruments, skid-mounted equipment.

ReplacedBy.title: Replaced By
ReplacedBy.description: Equipment substitution. sourceId is replaced by targetId (spare, upgrade, re-rating). Used in as-built / maintenance records.
